title: listrostachys thomensis
intro: Listrostachys thomensis is a succulent plant species endemic to the island of São Tomé, located off the coast of central Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and inflammation, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Listrostachys thomensis include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce pain and swelling, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Listrostachys thomensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
